falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above $25,000 (200-day moving average + 3 standard deviations)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this threshold would indicate strong bullish momentum, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 150% of the 90-day average volume for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal a major market shift or news event, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a clear directional bias (bullish or bearish).

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2022_may_luna drops below 50% with a confirmed divergence in RSI (14) below 30
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate the current market dynamics have diverged significantly from the historical pattern, falsifying the assumption that the situation is analogous to the 2022 bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
